---
title: "The first boke of the introduction of knowledge and a compendyous regyment or a dyetary of helth"
---

## The first boke of the introduction of knowledge and a compendyous regyment or a dyetary of helth

**Author:** Frederick James Furnivall
**Date:** 1870
**Imprint:** London: EETS

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
